ServerErrors.rateLimit: Whoa, slow down! Please wait a moment.
ServerErrors.participantLimit: Maximum 20 participants allowed per raclette event.
ServerErrors.itemLimit: Maximum 40 items allowed per raclette event.

seo.title: Organize your raclettes with friends easily
seo.description: No more complex calculations and forgotten items! {brand} computes the perfect quantities and helps you organize your raclette parties with friends.

hero.badge: The ultimate tool for your winter nights
hero.description: Forget endless Whatsapp messages trying to figure out who brings the machine. {brand} computes quantities and lets your guests assign themselves what they bring via a simple shared link.

chaos.title: Stop the last-minute struggles.
chaos.description: Nothing kills the mood faster than a cheese shortage or a forgotten raclette machine.

points.calcDesc: No more guessing games. We tell you exactly what you need to buy.
points.listDesc: Everyone knows what they need to bring via a simple unique link.
points.prefsDesc: No pork, vegetarian, small appetites... We adjust everything.

bubbles.hugo1: Wait, who can bring a 2nd raclette machine tonight? 😅
bubbles.you1: Good question... I don't have one, what can I bring?
bubbles.sarah1: I'm vegetarian, please don't get any cold cuts for me 🌱
bubbles.hugo2: Alright, so how much cheese are we getting for 8 people?

calculator.title: The Survival Calculator
calculator.description: Let's see... Use the slider to simulate your next party.

footer.title: More cheese, less mental load.
footer.description: Create your event in 30 seconds. Share the link with friends. Relax.

NewEvent.title: Create an event
NewEvent.description: Define the title, location, and date of your next raclette.
NewEvent.updateDescription: Review or update the details of your raclette night.

title.label: Title
title.description: A catchy name for your night

startsAt.label: Date & time
startsAt.previewFromDate: on {startsAtDate, date, ::MMMM} {day, selectordinal, one {#st} two {#nd} few {#rd} other {#th}} at {startsAtDate, time, ::hmm a}

errors.required: Please choose a date and time.
errors.invalid: Please enter a valid date and time.

errors.failed: Something went wrong. Please try again.

share.title: Share and invite
share.description: Invite your friends using this link, and add the event to your calendar.
share.text: You're invited to a raclette night!

Dashboard.title: Dashboard
Dashboard.description: Follow the progress of your raclette event and manage contributions.
Dashboard.noParticipants: Add participants to start recording contributions for this event.

dialog.title: Admin Contribution
dialog.description: Log who brings what for this item.

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.description: Once you delete an event, there is no going back. Please be certain.

modal.title: Are you absolutely sure?
modal.description: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your event and remove all participant data from our servers.

AdminParticipant.title: List of participants
AdminParticipant.description: Manage your participants, taking their specific needs into account

empty.title: No participants yet
empty.description: Add your participants manually here to start organizing your raclette.

create.title: New participant
create.description: Add a participant to the event

errors.required: Please specify the no pork option.
errors.invalid: Please provide a valid value for no pork.

empty.title: No items yet
empty.description: Add participants to auto-generate the list of required items.

PublicPage.intro: The organizer needs your help to make the evening perfect. Tell us what you're bringing.
PublicPage.empty: No one is bringing this yet.

stats.title: Preparation status
stats.stillMissing: Everyone has replied, but we're still missing some items! 🧀

myContributions.empty: You haven't committed to bringing anything yet! Tell us what you're bringing below. 👇
